error.message: The view 'Archive' or its master was not found or no view engine supports the searched locations. The following locations were searched: ~/Views/Partner/Archive.aspx ~/Views/Partner/Archive.ascx ~/Views/Shared/Archive.aspx ~/Views/Shared/Archive.ascx ~/Views/Partner/Archive.cshtml ~/Views/Partner/Archive.vbhtml ~/Views/Shared/Archive.cshtml ~/Views/Shared/Archive.vbhtml

The following locations were searched: ~/Views/Partner/Archive.aspx ~/Views/Partner/Archive.ascx ~/Views/Shared/Archive.aspx ~/Views/Shared/Archive.ascx ~/Views/Partner/Archive.cshtml
